complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Update Firestore Security Rules for Ownership Checks on Create and Update
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward rule updates with detailed pseudo-code provided. Requires careful testing with Firebase emulator but follows Firestore best practices for ownership checks. Low risk of breaking existing reads, high precision needed for security.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add `toFirestoreUpdate()` to ArticleModel and `updateArticle` to Data Source
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Simple model method addition and data source extension. Standard clean architecture pattern with clear field exclusions. Minimal dependencies, straightforward unit testing with fake_firestore.
Standard repository/use case layer extension following existing DataState pattern. Includes input validation and error handling. Straightforward dependency injection integration.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create EditArticleCubit, Edit Screen, and Route
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Create EditArticleCubit and states, 2) Extract shared ArticleFormWidget from upload screen, 3) Build EditArticleScreen with form integration, 4) Add edit route and detail screen button with owner check.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Most complex task: new cubit, shared widget extraction (refactoring risk), new screen, route integration, owner-only UI logic, DI registration. High coordination across layers with potential UI duplication issues.
Standard Firestore pagination implementation with cursor-based queries. New model required but well-specified. Follows Firestore best practices for pagination with startAfterDocument.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Create domain PaginatedArticles entity and repository method with News API merge strategy, 2) Implement GetArticlesPageUseCase and DI registration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Adds domain abstraction for pagination, complex News API + Firestore merge logic, opaque cursor handling to avoid Firestore dependency in domain. Requires careful state management design.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Update Home Feed Cubit and UI for Cursor-Based Pagination
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Update RemoteArticlesState and cubit methods (getArticles, loadMore), 2) Implement UI pagination trigger (button or scroll listener), 3) Update DI and test News API caching.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Refactors existing cubit (risk of regressions), adds pagination state management, News API caching logic, UI integration with scroll detection or button. Complex state transitions to test.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Integrate Markdown Editor Package and Create Shared MarkdownEditorWidget
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down: 1) Evaluate and select markdown editor package, 2) Create MarkdownEditorWidget with toolbar integration, 3) Implement custom toolbar fallback and character counter.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Package evaluation/selection, potential custom toolbar implementation, text selection manipulation logic, cross-platform rendering concerns. High uncertainty around package quality and integration.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Replace Content TextFormField with MarkdownEditorWidget on Upload and Edit Screens
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Simple widget replacement once MarkdownEditorWidget exists. Form validation integration straightforward. Low risk if using shared ArticleFormWidget from task 52.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Register All New Dependencies and End-to-End Integration Testing
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Complete DI registrations and route configuration, 2) Comprehensive E2E testing across all features (upload→edit→pagination→security).
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Integration task with risk of missing DI registrations causing runtime errors. Extensive E2E test scenarios across multiple user flows and security boundaries. Critical for feature completion.
